name: M Pawn Shop
description_short: M Pawn Shop is a pawn and financial services shop in East Los Angeles offering loans, check cashing, and buying/selling of used goods with friendly, knowledgeable staff.
description_long:
M Pawn Shop operates as a pawn shop serving the East Los Angeles community from its location on S Atlantic Boulevard. According to their business profile, the shop has been serving the local area for several years and positions itself as a reputable alternative financial services provider. The business has not completed verification through the listing platform as of the data collection date.

The shop offers a range of services including pawn loans, check cashing, buying and selling of used items, and other financial services. Their merchandise inventory spans jewelry, electronics, and musical instruments/gear. The business accepts multiple payment methods including credit cards and NFC mobile payments, and operates with extended weekday hours (9 AM–6:30 PM Monday–Friday) and weekend hours (10 AM–5:30 PM Saturday–Sunday).

According to aggregated customer feedback summarized on their profile, M Pawn Shop distinguishes itself through staff professionalism—specifically naming Mike and Jr. as trusted associates—and a well-organized shopping environment. Customers reportedly appreciate the welcoming atmosphere, fair dealing practices, and respectful treatment of valuables. The shop's music gear selection is noted as particularly well-curated and clean.

The business currently shows zero verified reviews on the listing platform, which limits independent validation of service quality claims. Feedback summaries indicate pricing varies by item condition and some customers found offers lower than expected, though still considered reasonable. As an unverified business listing, potential customers should contact the business directly to confirm current services, rates, and policies.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

best_for: East Los Angeles residents needing short-term collateral-based loans with quick funding
Customers looking to buy/sell used jewelry, electronics, or musical instruments locally
Individuals seeking check cashing or other alternative financial services in the area
diagnosis: M Pawn Shop is best suited for East Los Angeles residents who need quick collateral-based loans or want to buy/sell used items locally. However, the lack of verified reviews and unconfirmed business details mean you should contact them directly to verify current terms, rates, and services before committing.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
